Home / Services / Website Hosting / Business Hosting

🏢 Business Hosting

Built for businesses that need more power, security, and flexibility. Business Hosting includes 50GB SSD storage, unmetered bandwidth, free SSL, automatic daily backups with 30-day retention, a staging environment for testing changes before going live, up to 10 email accounts, advanced caching for lightning-fast page loads, and priority support with 4-hour response times. Your site is isolated from other users on our cloud infrastructure, meaning consistent performance even during traffic spikes. Perfect for established business websites, medium e-commerce stores, and membership sites.

Service Details

Category: Website Hosting

Credits Price: 24 credits (approx. £30)

Turnaround: Monthly subscription

How to Book

  1. Create a free account
  2. Purchase credits or subscribe to a plan
  3. Select this service and submit your brief
  4. Receive your completed project within Monthly subscription
Book Business Hosting Now

Related Website Hosting Services

  • Starter Hosting — Reliable shared hosting for small websites, blogs, and portfolios with 10GB SSD storage. (8 credits)
  • Professional Hosting — High-performance dedicated resources with 100GB NVMe, auto-scaling, and white-glove support. (48 credits)
  • Enterprise Hosting — Fully managed, high-availability hosting with dedicated infrastructure and 24/7 VIP support. (120 credits)

Why Choose Creative Kaygency for Business Hosting?

  • Professional quality at credit-friendly prices
  • Fast turnaround: Monthly subscription
  • Satisfaction guarantee with included revisions
  • Track progress from your personal dashboard
  • Save up to 20% by paying with credits
